calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-15-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated March 05, 2021 is admitted to probate. William Rauch is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $260,000.00 Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 26, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Continued To Jan-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
